steps.title: Identify the relationship between sentences
steps.content: The first sentence says cheetahs and whales were highly ranked among 'charismatic' animals. The second says no animal outranked the tiger — even with those high finishers, the tiger still came out on top. This signals a contrast or concession.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Still is the only contrastive transition: it concedes the first claim while emphasizing that the tiger still beat them. 'In other words' restates, 'As a result' shows cause, and 'For example' illustrates — none fit.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
